title: Sample paper title illustrating the publication schema
abstract: Edible molecules can be directly synthesized without agricultural feedstocks, saving land, water and GHG emissions. Dietary fats made from natural gas feedstock and average U.S. electricity would emit ~0.8 gCO₂-eq/kcal compared to 1–3 gCO₂-eq/kcal from agricultural fat production.
